## Summary

- Explain the user-facing or maintenance change.

## Testing

- Describe the checks you ran and any notable manual testing.

## Checklist

- [ ] I added or updated tests when behavior changed.
- [ ] I ran `vendor/bin/pint --test`.
- [ ] I ran `vendor/bin/phpstan analyse --no-progress`.
- [ ] I ran `vendor/bin/pest`.
- [ ] I did not manually edit `CHANGELOG.md`.
- [ ] My final squashed commit title follows Conventional Commits.
